name: Shelley Wright
summary: Astronomer and instrumentation specialist who served on NASA's UAP Independent Study Team.
profileSummary: Astronomer and instrumentation specialist who served on NASA's UAP Independent Study Team.
background: Professor of physics and astronomer specializing in optical and infrared instrumentation.
inclusionNote: Included because NASA appointed her to contribute astronomical instrumentation, observational methods, and technosignature-research experience.
